ddls:
CREATE TABLE "aircrafts" (
  "tail_number" TEXT /* Tail number of the aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the aircraft */,
  "year_manufactured" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "model_variant" TEXT /* Specific variant of the aircraft model */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tail_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "carrier_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the airline */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* City and country where the airline is headquartered */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airline */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the airline */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in feet */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the airport */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight associated with the delay */,
  "delay_type" TEXT /* Type of delay (e.g., departure, arrival) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the delay */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the delay on subsequent flights */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the delay cause */,
  "mitigation_actions" TEXT /* Actions taken to mitigate the delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight for which the metrics apply */,
  "on_time_performance" REAL /* Percentage of on-time performance */,
  "average_delay" REAL /* Average delay time in minutes */,
  "cancellation_rate" REAL /* Percentage of flights cancelled */,
  "diversion_rate" REAL /* Percentage of flights diverted */,
  "average_early_arrival" REAL /* Average early arrival time in minutes */,
  "average_early_departure" REAL /* Average early departure time in minutes */,
  "punctuality_index" REAL /* Overall punctuality index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operations manager, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., admin, standard, read-only) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight data */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight route */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Airport code for origin */,
  "dest" TEXT /* Airport code for destination */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the route in miles */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "average_passenger_load" INTEGER /* Average number of passengers on the route */,
  "average_baggage_weight" REAL /* Average weight of baggage on the route */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Status of the route (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_dest FOREIGN KEY ("dest") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_origin FOREIGN KEY ("origin") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)
